issues.title: Release Spring AI 1.0.0 M5 to maven central
issues.body: There was some bumps in the road last december, let's try again before M6.

issues.title: Remove deprecated Bedrock chat models
issues.body: The Bedrock Converse API replaces them.

issues.title: Remove 'with' prefix from builders for embedding models in Amazon' model
issues.body: Missed this in the previous go around.  Should look for any other 'with' methods to see if we forgot to cleanup in other placed.

comments.body: removing the models themselves, as they are deprecated, so closing.  see #2124
